layers.name: Governance and Institutional Intent
layers.responsibility: institutional purpose, doctrine, accountable intent, and Authority reference context

layers.name: Identity, Policy, Delegation, and Authority Context
layers.responsibility: Principal, identity, relationship, delegation, Policy, Grant, and Authority context

layers.name: Control Plane
layers.responsibility: Admission and Arbitration, Orchestration and Coordination, Enforcement and Dispatch

layers.name: Model and Reasoning Runtime
layers.responsibility: bounded model and reasoning computation without inherent governance Authority

layers.name: Tool and Data Execution Substrate
layers.responsibility: bounded tool, connector, credential, data, and external-effect execution substrate

layers.name: State, Memory, Lineage, and Reconstruction
layers.responsibility: state preservation, memory, lineage, evidence retention, replay support, and reconstruction

layers.name: Verification and Assurance
layers.responsibility: independent verification and assurance findings that remain non-authoritative by existence alone

governed_ingress_surface.name: Governed Intent and Interaction Ingress Surface
